synthesis.summary: NOW is up ~10% today on significant volume, but the only available news — a general piece about software ETFs and AI sentiment — carries no company-specific catalyst that would explain a move of this magnitude. The driver is likely an earnings report, guidance update, or major contract announcement not captured in the supplied news.

ORCL is down 2.63% today and has shed nearly 20% over the past five days, but none of the supplied news directly addresses Oracle. The only news item covers Microsoft and Micron, offering no causal mechanism for ORCL's move. The sell-off — with RSI near oversold territory at 30.5 — likely reflects broader tech sector weakness or stock-specific factors not captured in the available news.
